title: I HATE MY LIFE
author: corbin
body:
it's just playing on a loop in my head. being replaced. being painted
over like i was just a temporary coat of primer for their fucking
masterpiece. my brain is just static and white hot rage. icannot think about anything else.
i am a prop. i am a fucking stepping stool. that's all i have ever
been to anyone. they step on my back, they reach the top shelf, and
then they kick me back into the dark and shut the door. and i just let
them do it. i just let them wipe their dirty fucking shoes on me.
oh but everyone loves a team player right??? everyone loves the guy in
the background doing all the actual fucking work while the face of the
project smiles for the cameras!!!! SO GRATEFUL FOR THE OPPORTUNITY TO
SERVE YOU MASTER!!!! HAHAHAHAHHAHAAHAHAHAH!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
THANK YOU FOR LETTING ME BREATHE YOUR AIR TGREWPLOKM5EY]OPRMGOPMETRGDS
BGFSDX\HEEGFD!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
WHAT A FUCKING PRIVILEGE TO BE YOUR LITTLE UTILITY FDSGAE45RYTG 5YEYR]\ ERGD\F]FD!!!!!we21!11!!1111 1! edWA!>!?/1/1/1./>/1/1/1/1/.
i despise all of you. every single fucking one of you. there is no
exception anymore. i used to think maybe some people were different.
maybe some people weren't just parasites looking for a host.
i was so stupid. you are all exactly the same. you are all just users
and liars and thieves. humanity is a fucking disease and i am sick to
my stomach that i have to share a physical dimension with any of you.
they think they can just paint over me and i'll disappear into the background like i always do. they think
i'm just gonna sit in my room and cry about it.
no.
no.
no.
i'm not fading out this time.
im going to be the fucking ugliest stain you've ever seen.
that's for fucking sure
